raw: {"perspective": "PR & Media", "findings": [{"severity": "major", "file_or_area": "press narrative", "issue": "No press narrative ready for pre-launch awareness", "recommended_fix": "Develop a comprehensive press narrative highlighting VOLAURA's unique value proposition"}, {"severity": "minor", "file_or_area": "AZ media landscape", "issue": "Only ICTnews.az and startup.az match our story", "recommended_fix": "Expand media outreach to include report.az and 1news.az"}, {"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "GITA grant application", "issue": "Application material not ready", "recommended_fix": "Prepare and finalize application material before May 27 deadline"}, {"severity": "minor", "file_or_area": "startup competition pipeline", "issue": "Only Seedstars and ASAN Innovations considered", "recommended_fix": "Research and add AzInTelecom to the pipeline"}, {"severity": "major", "file_or_area": "founder visibility", "issue": "CEO's LinkedIn presence not optimized for launch", "recommended_fix": "Enhance CEO's LinkedIn profile and content to build thought leadership"}], "overall_verdict": 6, "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: No press narrative ready for pre-launch awareness
findings.recommended_fix: Develop a comprehensive press narrative highlighting VOLAURA's unique value proposition

findings.issue: Only ICTnews.az and startup.az match our story
findings.recommended_fix: Expand media outreach to include report.az and 1news.az
Prepare and finalize application material before May 27 deadline

findings.issue: Only Seedstars and ASAN Innovations considered
findings.recommended_fix: Research and add AzInTelecom to the pipeline

findings.issue: CEO's LinkedIn presence not optimized for launch
findings.recommended_fix: Enhance CEO's LinkedIn profile and content to build thought leadership
